title: You can now customize Siri’s pace and expressivity in the latest iOS 27 beta
summary_raw: The update is part of Apple's broader effort to make Siri feel more natural and personal, as it rebuilds the assistant around generative AI.

title: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
summary_raw: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google’s privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as “images, files, and audio and video recordings,” to improve its AI models.
headline: If you use Google, you’re training its AI. Here’s how to opt out.
summary: Consider this a belated PSA: A recent change to Google’s privacy settings is allowing the company to store more of your data, including media such as “images, files, and audio and video recordings,” to improve its AI models.
